name: waveforge
description: A 7-agent binaural & brainwave audio studio: turn an intent (relax, focus, sleep, or publishable content) into a finished, headphone-ready track. Designs the entrainment protocol (carrier + beat across delta/theta/alpha/beta/gamma), builds the ambient bed, writes guided scripts, renders a REAL stereo .wav with Python, FFT-verifies the beat, runs a safety gate, and writes release copy. Bilingual RO/EN, honest non-medical claims, human gates.
